title: Tender Adventurous Garlic Slovakian Stir-fry
description: A gluten-free and adventurous garlic Slovakian dish featuring tender vegetables with apricot flavoring and cured meats.

ingredients.name: 25g mixed cured meats (like salami and chorizo), finely chopped
Water or gluten-free stock to cover vegetables

instructions: Cut mixed vegetables into bite-sized pieces and place them in a baking dish.
Mix together finely minced garlic, chopped apricot, paprika, olive oil, salt, pepper, and water or stock. Pour over the vegetables in the baking dish.
Roast in preheated oven for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally to ensure even cooking.
Add mixed cured meats on top of the roasted vegetables during the last minute of roasting time.
Remove from oven once cooked through and serve hot.
